---
title: "DataScouteR"
subtitle: "Football Transfer Analytics · Powered by R"
---

```{=html}
<div style="margin:2.5rem 0 1rem;">
  <div style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.7rem;color:#1DB954;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:1rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.6rem;">
    <span style="display:inline-block;width:24px;height:1px;background:#1DB954;"></span>
    Data-Driven Football Intelligence
  </div>
  <p style="font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(1.6rem,4vw,2.6rem);font-weight:700;letter-spacing:-0.03em;line-height:1.1;color:#F0F4FF;margin-bottom:1.5rem;">
    Transfer intelligence<br/>built on real data.
  </p>
  <p style="font-size:0.95rem;line-height:1.75;color:rgba(240,244,255,0.65);max-width:560px;margin-bottom:2rem;">
    DataScouteR combines non-parametric statistics and empirical backtesting to evaluate football transfers across 25+ global leagues.
    Every projection is grounded in historical data — not intuition.
  </p>
  <div style="display:flex;gap:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:3rem;">
    <a href="gre1.qmd" style="font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:0.88rem;font-weight:600;padding:0.7rem 1.5rem;border-radius:6px;background:#1DB954;color:#0B1120;text-decoration:none;transition:all 0.2s;">
      Browse Transfer Cards
    </a>
    <a href="about.qmd" style="font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:0.88rem;font-weight:600;padding:0.7rem 1.5rem;border-radius:6px;background:transparent;color:#F0F4FF;text-decoration:none;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);">
      About this project
    </a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Stats bar -->
<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:1rem;background:#161F30;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);border-radius:10px;padding:1.8rem;margin-bottom:3rem;">
  <div style="text-align:center;">
    <div style="font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:2rem;font-weight:700;color:#1DB954;letter-spacing:-0.03em;">4</div>
    <div style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.62rem;color:#8B8FA8;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.1em;margin-top:0.3rem;">Seasons</div>
  </div>
  <div style="text-align:center;">
    <div style="font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:2rem;font-weight:700;color:#1DB954;letter-spacing:-0.03em;">25+</div>
    <div style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.62rem;color:#8B8FA8;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.1em;margin-top:0.3rem;">Leagues</div>
  </div>
  <div style="text-align:center;">
    <div style="font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:2rem;font-weight:700;color:#1DB954;letter-spacing:-0.03em;">6</div>
    <div style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.62rem;color:#8B8FA8;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.1em;margin-top:0.3rem;">Positions</div>
  </div>
  <div style="text-align:center;">
    <div style="font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:2rem;font-weight:700;color:#1DB954;letter-spacing:-0.03em;">12</div>
    <div style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.62rem;color:#8B8FA8;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.1em;margin-top:0.3rem;">Metrics</div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## What you'll find here

**Data-Driven Insights** — analytics on whether a player fits a club's tactical and statistical profile, based on 4 seasons of per-90 data across 25+ leagues.

**Transfer Grading** — every transfer card shows a player's percentile ranking in the target league, a projection tier, strengths and risks per metric, and an empirical success probability derived from the backtest.

**Backtested Projections** — the model is validated against real 25/26 outcomes. The probabilities you see are not assumptions — they are frequencies from historical transfers.

Use the navigation bar above to explore transfer cards by league.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Projection tiers

```{=html}
<table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:0.85rem;margin:1rem 0 2rem;">
  <thead>
    <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);">
      <th style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.62rem;color:#8B8FA8;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-align:left;padding:0.6rem 0.8rem;">Tier</th>
      <th style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.62rem;color:#8B8FA8;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-align:left;padding:0.6rem 0.8rem;">Percentile</th>
      <th style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.62rem;color:#8B8FA8;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-align:left;padding:0.6rem 0.8rem;">What it means</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04);">
      <td style="padding:0.7rem 0.8rem;"><span style="font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:600;padding:0.25rem 0.7rem;border-radius:4px;background:rgba(255,215,0,0.12);color:#FFD700;">Elite / League Star</span></td>
      <td style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.72rem;color:#8B8FA8;padding:0.7rem 0.8rem;">≥ 90%</td>
      <td style="font-size:0.82rem;color:rgba(240,244,255,0.6);padding:0.7rem 0.8rem;">Top 10% — a genuinely standout signing.</td>
    </tr>
    <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04);">
      <td style="padding:0.7rem 0.8rem;"><span style="font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:600;padding:0.25rem 0.7rem;border-radius:4px;background:rgba(29,185,84,0.12);color:#1DB954;">Top 5 Caliber</span></td>
      <td style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.72rem;color:#8B8FA8;padding:0.7rem 0.8rem;">75 – 89%</td>
      <td style="font-size:0.82rem;color:rgba(240,244,255,0.6);padding:0.7rem 0.8rem;">Top quarter — high-quality starter.</td>
    </tr>
    <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04);">
      <td style="padding:0.7rem 0.8rem;"><span style="font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:600;padding:0.25rem 0.7rem;border-radius:4px;background:rgba(74,158,255,0.10);color:#4A9EFF;">Reliable Starter</span></td>
      <td style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.72rem;color:#8B8FA8;padding:0.7rem 0.8rem;">50 – 74%</td>
      <td style="font-size:0.82rem;color:rgba(240,244,255,0.6);padding:0.7rem 0.8rem;">Above median — solid, consistent contributor.</td>
    </tr>
    <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04);">
      <td style="padding:0.7rem 0.8rem;"><span style="font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:600;padding:0.25rem 0.7rem;border-radius:4px;background:rgba(139,143,168,0.12);color:#8B8FA8;">Rotation / Squad</span></td>
      <td style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.72rem;color:#8B8FA8;padding:0.7rem 0.8rem;">25 – 49%</td>
      <td style="font-size:0.82rem;color:rgba(240,244,255,0.6);padding:0.7rem 0.8rem;">Below median — useful depth or developing player.</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td style="padding:0.7rem 0.8rem;"><span style="font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:600;padding:0.25rem 0.7rem;border-radius:4px;background:rgba(230,57,70,0.12);color:#E63946;">Below Average</span></td>
      <td style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.72rem;color:#8B8FA8;padding:0.7rem 0.8rem;">< 25%</td>
      <td style="font-size:0.82rem;color:rgba(240,244,255,0.6);padding:0.7rem 0.8rem;">Bottom quarter — transfer carries performance risk.</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

> **Leagues currently covered:** Greek Super League (GRE1). Additional leagues will be published as transfer windows progress.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## How to read the cards

Every transfer card on DataScouteR is built from the same set of rules. Understanding them makes every number meaningful.

### Metrics are position-specific

Each metric is calculated and ranked **only against players who play the same position**. A Striker's Scoring percentile is compared to other Strikers — not to Centre Backs or Goalkeepers. This matters because positions have completely different statistical profiles. A 72% Scoring for a Central Midfielder means something very different from a 72% Scoring for a Forward. The comparison is always apples to apples.

The six positions modelled are: **Goalkeeper · Centre Back · Wing Back · Central Midfielder · Winger · Forward**. Metrics are selected per position to reflect what actually matters at each role.

### Percentiles are based on the most recent season only

The percentile ranking for a player uses **only their most recent season's statistics** — not a career average. A player who was elite two seasons ago but declined in 25/26 is ranked on their 25/26 form. This is intentional: transfers are decisions about a player's current profile, not their historical peak.

The **reference distribution** used for comparison spans all four seasons (22/23 to 25/26) in the target league, giving a robust baseline. But the **player's input** is always their latest season.

### What a percentile actually means

```{=html}
<div style="background:#161F30;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);border-radius:10px;padding:1.6rem 1.8rem;margin:1.2rem 0 2rem;">
  <div style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.62rem;color:#8B8FA8;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.1em;margin-bottom:1.2rem;">How to read a percentile number</div>
  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.9rem;">

    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:52px 1fr;gap:1rem;align-items:start;">
      <span style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:#1DB954;">72%</span>
      <span style="font-size:0.85rem;color:rgba(240,244,255,0.7);line-height:1.55;">This player outperforms <strong style="color:#F0F4FF;">72 out of every 100</strong> players at the same position in the target league on this metric. They are in the top 28%.</span>
    </div>

    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:52px 1fr;gap:1rem;align-items:start;">
      <span style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:#4A9EFF;">50%</span>
      <span style="font-size:0.85rem;color:rgba(240,244,255,0.7);line-height:1.55;">This player is exactly at the <strong style="color:#F0F4FF;">league median</strong> for this metric. Half the league is above them, half below.</span>
    </div>

    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:52px 1fr;gap:1rem;align-items:start;">
      <span style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:#E63946;">33%</span>
      <span style="font-size:0.85rem;color:rgba(240,244,255,0.7);line-height:1.55;">This player is <strong style="color:#F0F4FF;">below the median</strong>. Two thirds of their positional peers in the league post higher numbers on this metric.</span>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```

### How metrics are scored

Each metric starts as a raw count (e.g. long balls per game). It is then:

1.  **Normalised to per-90 minutes** — removing playing time bias
2.  **Scaled globally to 1–20** across all leagues and seasons on a single scale
3.  **Multiplied by an Opta difficulty coefficient** (ENG1 = 1.0, GRE1 = 0.75, etc.) — baking league difficulty directly into the score

This means a score of 14 in GRE1 and a score of 14 in ENG1 do **not** represent the same output — the Premier League score is unweighted, the Greek Super League score has been deflated to reflect that the same raw output is harder to achieve in a tougher league. Cross-league comparisons are therefore valid without any further adjustment.

### The three colour bands on every card

```{=html}
<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.6rem;margin:1rem 0 2rem;">
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:140px 1fr;align-items:center;gap:1rem;">
    <span style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:600;color:#1DB954;background:rgba(29,185,84,0.12);padding:0.3rem 0.7rem;border-radius:4px;text-align:center;">✦ STRENGTH ≥ 60%</span>
    <span style="font-size:0.83rem;color:rgba(240,244,255,0.65);">The player clearly outperforms the majority of positional peers at this level. A genuine asset that a club can rely on.</span>
  </div>
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:140px 1fr;align-items:center;gap:1rem;">
    <span style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:600;color:#4A9EFF;background:rgba(74,158,255,0.10);padding:0.3rem 0.7rem;border-radius:4px;text-align:center;">◈ NEUTRAL 40–59%</span>
    <span style="font-size:0.83rem;color:rgba(240,244,255,0.65);">Around the league median. Competent but not a differentiator. These metrics won't win or lose a transfer argument.</span>
  </div>
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:140px 1fr;align-items:center;gap:1rem;">
    <span style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:600;color:#E63946;background:rgba(230,57,70,0.12);padding:0.3rem 0.7rem;border-radius:4px;text-align:center;">▼ RISK &lt; 40%</span>
    <span style="font-size:0.83rem;color:rgba(240,244,255,0.65);">Below the league median. The player will likely be exposed here relative to peers. How serious this is depends on how important the metric is to the specific club's system.</span>
  </div>
</div>
```

### What the asterisk (\*) on each card means

Every transfer card carries a footnote marked with `*`. It states three things that are easy to forget when reading a number:

-   **The comparison group** — which position and which league the percentile is drawn from
-   **The data window** — that the player's scores are from their most recent season only, not a career average
-   **What the model cannot see** — injury history, tactical system fit, psychological adaptation, and contract terms are outside the scope of this analysis

The asterisk is not a disclaimer to ignore. It is a reminder that data answers *how does this player rank statistically* — a club's scouts and coaching staff answer *does this player fit our specific system*.

------------------------------------------------------------------------
